Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel S. Brome, Esq. of Weinberg Roger & Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1001, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
